seed_pages.content:
---
title: Alice Example
type: person
aliases: [alice]
summary: Founder of Widget Co.
---

Alice Example is the founder of Widget Co.

turns.text: Just got off the diligence call with Alice Example.
She is worried the widget-co pricing model undercuts their gross margin. Big concern for the seed round.
Also she said their MRR hit $X last month, ahead of plan. I committed to sending her the diligence checklist by Friday.
